nasb.text: “On that day I will make a horn sprout for the house of Israel, and I will open your mouth in their midst. Then they will know that I am the Lord.”

esv.text: “On that day I will cause a horn to spring up for the house of Israel, and I will open your lips among them. Then they will know that I am the Lord.”

cnv.text: 到了那天，我必使以色列家的角生出來，我也必使你以西結在他們中間開口。他們就知道我是耶和華。”

ccb.text: “到那天，我必复兴以色列，使你以西结在他们当中开口说话，这样他们就知道我是耶和华。”
